plugins.name: skill-discovery
plugins.description: Find and evaluate skills before installing. Prefer global install (-g).

plugins.name: skill-authoring
plugins.description: Create, generalize, patch, and audit skills. Prefer global install (-g).

plugins.name: agent-initialization
plugins.description: Initialize a repository for AI agent workflows. Prefer project install (default).

plugins.name: awesome-list-maintenance
plugins.description: Manage curated awesome-list sources and entries. configure-awesome-sources: global; update-awesome-list: project.
